objective: Rebuild xiuxiuzhushou into a local-first app with persistent repo memory, structural guardrails, and closed-loop verification.

tasks.title: Reset the repo to a minimal React + TypeScript shell
tasks.notes: Old business files were removed and the app now restarts from a small, auditable surface.

tasks.title: Model plans, habits, rewards, and balance as pure domain commands
tasks.notes: State mutations are now pure and testable in src/domain/model.ts.

tasks.title: Add architecture guardrails and evidence-producing verification scripts
tasks.notes: Scripts block invalid imports and write a verdict plus state snapshots.

tasks.title: Expand the dashboard into richer workflows
tasks.notes: Next work should add editing, filters, and deeper activity exploration without breaking the current guardrails.

tasks.title: Capture homepage reference requirements from screenshots
tasks.notes: Homepage reference was documented with brand rename to 缁ｇ唬鍔╂墜 and top-right profile switching semantics.

tasks.title: Rebuild the homepage shell to match the reference dashboard
tasks.notes: The homepage now renders the branded hero, summary-card strip, tab shell, week navigator, date-scoped board states, and persists the active plans/habits tab locally.

tasks.title: Capture populated historical plan-board requirements from screenshots
tasks.notes: The homepage board now documents populated historical cards, per-day dots, board controls, and the click-through detail modal.

tasks.title: Capture current-day active plan-board requirements from screenshots
tasks.notes: The homepage board now documents today's actionable plan cards, including card-level quick-complete and start-timer buttons.

tasks.title: Implement the study-plan detail modal
tasks.notes: Historical homepage plan cards now open a detail modal with plan summary, creation time, date span, recorded completion sessions, attachment metadata, and footer placeholder actions for edit/delete follow-up flows.

tasks.title: Implement current-day study-plan card actions
tasks.notes: Today's homepage study-plan cards now render direct quick-complete and start-timer entry buttons. Quick-complete is wired to the modal flow; start-timer remains a placeholder entry until the dedicated timer page lands.

tasks.title: Capture quick-complete modal requirements from screenshots
tasks.notes: The repo now documents the quick-complete modal with duration tabs, preset durations, note field, note attachments, and confirm/cancel footer actions.

tasks.title: Implement the quick-complete task modal
tasks.notes: The homepage now opens a quick-complete modal from today's plan cards, supports duration entry with presets, note text, local completion attachments, and confirms into the domain completion flow.

tasks.title: Capture study-timer page requirements from screenshots
tasks.notes: The repo now documents the dedicated timer page with elapsed, countdown, and pomodoro modes, plus sound control and learning-recording entry.

tasks.title: Implement the dedicated study-timer page
tasks.notes: Build the full-page timer workspace opened from today's plan cards, including mode switching, digital timer display, sound control, and mode-specific helper panels.

tasks.title: Capture plan-management requirements from screenshots
tasks.notes: The repo now documents the plan-management page, selected-state toolbar, copy-to-date modal, and recurring-task delete-scope modal.

tasks.title: Implement the dedicated plan-management page
tasks.notes: The homepage `管理` entry now opens a dedicated management page with date navigation, selection bar, instruction panel, drag-handle reordering for the selected day, and save/cancel header actions; copy/share/delete remain placeholder flow entries until their downstream surfaces land.

tasks.title: Implement the copy-to-date modal for selected plans
tasks.notes: Build the modal that copies selected plans from the managed date to a chosen target date through a calendar picker.

tasks.title: Implement the delete-selected modal for recurring plans
tasks.notes: Build the modal that lets the user delete only the current date or all recurring occurrences for selected plans.

tasks.title: Capture the share-plan flow from plan management
tasks.notes: The selected-state toolbar confirms a 鍒嗕韩璁″垝 action exists, but its downstream UI has not been provided yet.

tasks.title: Capture 娣诲姞瀛︿範璁″垝 reference requirements from screenshots
tasks.notes: The add-plan page now has a dedicated spec for fields, time modes, scoring, attachments, and footer actions.

tasks.title: Implement the dedicated 娣诲姞瀛︿範璁″垝 page
tasks.notes: The homepage `添加计划` entry now opens a dedicated full-page creation form with date/category/title/content fields, duration vs. fixed-time switching, optional custom stars, local attachment preview, and save/cancel navigation back into the plan board.

tasks.title: Capture category and repeat-type option lists
tasks.notes: The add-plan screenshots now provide both the repeat-type list and the built-in category list. The form includes the captured subject options; custom-category management remains a separate follow-up flow.

tasks.title: Capture 鎵归噺娣诲姞瀛︿範璁″垝 reference requirements from screenshots
tasks.notes: The batch-add page is now documented with text parsing rules, shared settings, preview behavior, and attachment limitations.

tasks.title: Implement the dedicated 鎵归噺娣诲姞瀛︿範璁″垝 page
tasks.notes: The homepage `批量添加` entry now opens a dedicated two-column page with the attachment-warning banner, raw-text input plus unified settings, live preview count, and a save footer that writes each parsed row into local study plans.

tasks.title: Implement text parsing for batch plan input
tasks.notes: The batch-create flow now parses category headers with numbered task rows into previewable plans, ignores blank lines, and reuses shared duration and optional custom-star defaults when saving.

tasks.title: Capture non-empty batch preview states
tasks.notes: Current screenshots only show the zero-item preview; row structure after parsing is still unknown.

tasks.title: Capture AI 鏅鸿兘鍒涘缓 reference requirements from screenshots
tasks.notes: The AI page is now documented as a chat workspace with history, image upload, prompt chips, and plan conversion into homepage study plans.

tasks.title: Implement the dedicated AI 鏅鸿兘鍒涘缓 page
tasks.notes: The homepage `智能创建` entry now opens a dedicated AI workspace with the screenshot-aligned top bar, trial notice, session-history sidebar, empty-state prompt chips, image upload entry, and a local multi-turn composer that records draft conversations.

tasks.title: Design and implement AI output to structured plan conversion
tasks.notes: AI responses must resolve into the same study-plan schema used by manual and batch creation.

tasks.title: Add local session history for AI planning conversations
tasks.notes: The reference page shows 浼氳瘽鍘嗗彶 and 鏂颁細璇? but populated-history visuals are still unknown.

tasks.notes: Support single, multi, cycle, and forever modes with their mode-specific validation and counters.

tasks.title: Capture wish create/edit/delete/redeem follow-up states

tasks.title: Capture 绉垎鍘嗗彶 detail page
tasks.notes: The points-history page is now documented with range filters, summary cards, tabs, empty state, and grouped records.

tasks.notes: The repo now documents the dedicated habit statistics page with summary cards, week/month/history range chips, and the zero-state CTA back to habit check-ins.
